---
title: 'Ansys Sphinx Theme cheat-sheet'
format: cheat_sheet-pdf
params:
  version: main
footer: ansys-sphinx-theme
footerlinks:
  - urls: 'https://sphinxdocs.ansys.com'
    text: Documentation
  - urls: 'https://sphinxdocs.ansys.com/version/stable/getting-started/installation.html'
    text: Getting started
  - urls: 'https://sphinxdocs.ansys.com/version/stable/user-guide/options.html'
    text: Theme options
  - urls: 'https://sphinxdocs.ansys.com/version/stable/user-guide/autoapi.html'
    text: AutoAPI
  - urls: 'https://github.com/ansys/ansys-sphinx-theme'
    text: GitHub
execute:
    eval: false
latex-clean: true
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .qmd
      format_name: quarto
      format_version: '1.0'
      jupytext_version: 1.16.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---

# Basic Configuration

```{python}
#| eval: false
from ansys_sphinx_theme import ansys_favicon, get_version_match, __version__

html_theme = "ansys_sphinx_theme"
html_favicon = ansys_favicon
html_short_title = html_title = "My Library"
html_theme_options = {
    "github_url": "https://github.com/ansys/my-library",
    "contact_mail": "pyansys.core@ansys.com",
    "logo": "ansys",           # "ansys" | "pyansys" | "no_logo"
    "logo_link": "https://www.ansys.com",
    "show_breadcrumbs": True,
    "additional_breadcrumbs": [("PyAnsys", "https://docs.pyansys.com/")],
    "collapse_navigation": True,
    "pygments_light_style": "friendly",
    "pygments_dark_style": "monokai",
}
```

# Version Switcher

```{python}
#| eval: false
html_theme_options = {
    "switcher": {
        "json_url": f"https://{cname}/versions.json",
        "version_match": get_version_match(__version__),
    },
}
# get_version_match("0.11.0dev0") → "dev"
# get_version_match("0.11.2")     → "0.11"
```

# Navigation Bar & Sidebar

```{python}
#| eval: false
html_theme_options = {
    "navbar_end": ["search-button-field", "version-switcher",
                   "theme-switcher", "navbar-icon-links"],
    "icon_links": [{"name": "GitHub",
                    "url": "https://github.com/ansys/my-lib",
                    "icon": "fa-brands fa-github"}],
    "hidden_icons": ["GitHub"],    # hide specific icons
    "show_icons": False,            # hide all icons
    "secondary_sidebar_items": ["page-toc", "edit-this-page", "sourcelink"],
    "show_page_toc": True,
    "show_source_button": True,
}
```

# Search

```{python}
#| eval: false
html_theme_options = {
    "static_search": {
        "threshold": 0.5, "limit": 10,
        "delay": 300,               # ms debounce; 0 to disable
        "files_to_exclude": ["api/", "_build"],
    },
    "search_extra_sources": {      # multi-index search
        "PyAnsys": "https://docs.pyansys.com/version/stable/",
    },
    "search_filters": {            # result grouping
        "User Guide": ["user-guide/", "getting-started/"],
        "Release Notes": ["changelog"],
        "Examples": ["examples/"],
    },
}
# Serve locally to test (required for CORS):
# python -m http.server  →  http://localhost:8000
```

# Cheat Sheet Sidebar

```{python}
#| eval: false
html_theme_options = {
    "cheatsheet": {
        "file": "cheat_sheet/cheat_sheet.qmd",
        "title": "Ansys Sphinx Theme cheat sheet",
        "version": f"{version}",
        "pages": ["index"],
    },
}
```

# AutoAPI Extension

```{python}
#| eval: false
extensions = ["ansys_sphinx_theme.extension.autoapi"]

html_theme_options = {
    "ansys_sphinx_theme_autoapi": {
        "project": "My Library",
        "output": "api",
        "directory": "src/ansys",
        "use_implicit_namespaces": True,
        "own_page_level": "class",
        "options": ["members", "undoc-members",
                    "show-inheritance", "show-module-summary"],
        "member_order": "bysource",  # "alphabetical" | "groupwise"
        "package_depth": 3,
    }
}
```

# Linkcode Extension

```{python}
#| eval: false
extensions = ["ansys_sphinx_theme.extension.linkcode"]

link_code_library = "ansys/my-library"
link_code_source  = "src"
link_code_branch  = "main"
# or via html_context:
html_context = {"github_user": "ansys", "github_repo": "my-library",
                "github_version": "main", "source_path": "src"}
```

# PDF Cover Page & 404

```{python}
#| eval: false
from ansys_sphinx_theme import (
    ansys_logo_white, ansys_logo_white_cropped,
    watermark, latex, generate_404,
)
from sphinx.builders.latex import LaTeXBuilder

LaTeXBuilder.supported_image_types = ["image/png", "image/pdf", "image/svg+xml"]
latex_additional_files = [watermark, ansys_logo_white, ansys_logo_white_cropped]
latex_elements = {"preamble": latex.generate_preamble(html_title)}
latex_engine = "xelatex"

notfound_context = {"body": generate_404()}
notfound_no_urls_prefix = True
```

# What's New Section

`pip install ansys-sphinx-theme[changelog]`

Create `doc/changelog.d/whatsnew.yml`:

```{python}
#| eval: false
# fragments:
#   - title: Feature title
#     version: 0.11.0
#     content: |
#       RST description.
```

Enable in `conf.py`:

```{python}
#| eval: false
html_theme_options = {
    "whatsnew": {
        "file": "changelog.d/whatsnew.yml",
        "title": "What's new",
        "version": f"{version}",
        "pages": ["index"],
    },
}
```
